tier_info.name: Conversation
tier_info.description: Multi-turn dialogue; intent must be tracked across 4–8 turns.

samples.transcript: [Turn 1] Can you turn on the heat? [Turn 2] Actually just the driver side. [Turn 3] 72 degrees. [Turn 4] Thanks.
samples.reasoning: Intent is built across turns: heat → driver only → 72; final tool call merges all constraints.
